subcodes.first_line: A Remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God on the Day whereon the supreme Terror was made manifest and the Lord of Destiny appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله فی یوم فیه ظهر الفزع الاکبر و اتی مالک القدر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
